title: rubus fruticosus var. horridus
intro: Rubus fruticosus var. horridus, also known as bramble or blackberry, is a thorny shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus fruticosus var. horridus include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or jam, with the leaves and fruits being used in herbal preparations to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
